_why_invalid: The validator rejects 'agents' as a bare directory path. Even as a string starting with './', the validator requires enumerated agent file paths. Error observed in affaan-m/everything-claude-code PLUGIN_SCHEMA_NOTES: 'The validator does not accept directory paths for agents'. See also anthropics/claude-code#44777 for the related '.claude/ prefix' variation.
name: bad-agents-directory
description: Fails: agents as bare directory path
